description: Payment Status Report: Instructing Agent must be a Financial Institution Identification.
Payment Status Report: Instructed Agent must be a Financial Institution Identification.
Group Status (GrpSts) must be a valid ExternalPaymentTransactionStatus code.
Transaction Status (TxSts) must be a valid ExternalPaymentTransactionStatus code.
If TxSts = RJCT, StsRsnInf is mandatory.
expression: VALUE != 'RJCT' or any(k.startswith(KEY.rsplit('.TxSts',1)[0] + '.StsRsnInf') for k in DATA.keys())
errorMessage: When TxSts = RJCT, a <StsRsnInf> block with the rejection reason is mandatory.

description: If TxSts = PDNG, StsRsnInf should be present to explain the pending reason.
expression: VALUE != 'PDNG' or any(k.startswith(KEY.rsplit('.TxSts',1)[0] + '.StsRsnInf') for k in DATA.keys())
errorMessage: When TxSts = PDNG, providing <StsRsnInf> explaining the pending reason is recommended.
fix: Consider adding <StsRsnInf> with reason code PD01/PD02/PD03/etc.

description: Status Reason Code must be a valid ISO 20022 status reason code.
Original Message ID is mandatory in OrgnlGrpInfAndSts.
Original Message Name ID is mandatory.
Either OrgnlGrpInfAndSts or TxInfAndSts must be present (status reports must reference an original).
errorMessage: A status report (pacs.002) must reference an original via <OrgnlGrpInfAndSts> or <TxInfAndSts>.
fix: Add at least one of these blocks pointing to the original message being reported on.
